2605.17558.title: Firefly: Illuminating Large-Scale Verified Tool-Call Data Generation from Real APIs
2605.17558.paper_summary: Training tool-calling agents requires large-scale trajectory data with verifiable labels, yet existing approaches either synthesize environments that diverge from real API behavior or generate tasks without ground-truth outcomes for verification. We present FireFly, a pipeline for generating verified tool-call data from real-world MCP servers. Our key insight is to invert the standard synthesis pipeline: rather than generating tasks and hoping they are solvable, we first let a strong LLM explore real APIs along graph-guided DAG structures, then synthesize tasks backward from observed outcomes, guaranteeing label correctness by construction. To handle the scale of real-world tool spaces (${\sim}$1,000 tools), we build a pairwise tool graph and sample sub-DAGs to focus exploration on semantically coherent workflows. To address environment drift in live APIs, we construct a retrieval-augmented simulator that caches all exploration results and replays them during training and evaluation, enabling fully offline and reproducible RL. Applying this pipeline yields 5,144 verified tasks spanning 240 servers and 993 tools. A 4B-parameter model trained with GRPO on FireFly matches Claude Sonnet 4.6 on our held-out test set and shows improvements on multiple tool-calling benchmarks including Tau2-Bench, MCPMark, and MCP-Atlas.
2605.17558.paper_summary_zh: 訓練工具呼叫代理需要具有可驗證標籤的大規模軌跡數據，然而現有的方法要麼合成與真實 API 行為偏離的環境，要麼生成沒有真實結果以供驗證的任務。我們提出了 FireFly，一個從現實世界的 MCP 伺服器生成經過驗證的工具呼叫數據的管道。我們的關鍵見解是反轉標準合成管道：我們首先讓一個強大的 LLM 沿著圖引導的 DAG 結構探索真實的 API，而不是生成任務並希望它們是可解的，然後從觀察到的結果向後合成任務，通過構造保證標籤的正確性。為了處理現實世界工具空間的規模（約 1,000 個工具），我們構建了一個成對工具圖，並抽樣子 DAG 以集中探索語義上連貫的工作流程。為了解決實時 API 中的環境漂移，我們構建了一個增強檢索的模擬器，該模擬器緩存所有探索結果並在訓練和評估期間重放它們，實現完全離線和可重現的強化學習。應用這個管道產生了 5,144 個經過驗證的任務，涵蓋 240 個伺服器和 993 個工具。使用 GRPO 在 FireFly 上訓練的 4B 參數模型在我們的保留測試集上與 Claude Sonnet 4.6 匹配，並在多個工具呼叫基準測試中顯示出改進，包括 Tau2-Bench、MCPMark 和 MCP-Atlas。
2605.17558.author: Yuxuan Lu et.al.
2605.17558.authors: Yuxuan Lu, Ziyi Wang, Yingzhou Lu, Yisi Sang, Jiri Gesi, Xianfeng Tang, Yimeng Zhang, Zhenwei Dai, Hui Liu, Hanqing Lu, Chen Luo, Qi He, Benoit Dumoulin, Jing Huang, Dakuo Wang
